reagent_H.name: Hydrogen
reagent_H.description: The lightest and most abundant element in the universe. Atomic number 1.

reagent_O.name: Oxygen
reagent_O.description: Essential for respiration. Atomic number 8. Highly reactive!

reagent_N.name: Nitrogen
reagent_N.description: Makes up 78% of Earth's atmosphere. Atomic number 7.

reagent_C.name: Carbon
reagent_C.description: The building block of organic chemistry. Atomic number 6.

reagent_Na.name: Sodium
reagent_Na.description: A soft, silvery-white alkali metal. Atomic number 11. Reacts vigorously with water!

molecule_H2.name: Molecular Hydrogen
molecule_H2.description: The simplest molecule — two hydrogen atoms bonded together.

molecule_O2.name: Molecular Oxygen
molecule_O2.description: The oxygen we breathe — vital for life!

molecule_N2.name: Molecular Nitrogen
molecule_N2.description: The most abundant gas in our atmosphere.

molecule_H2O.name: Water
molecule_H2O.description: The universal solvent — essential for all life.

molecule_CO2.name: Carbon Dioxide
molecule_CO2.description: Used by plants in photosynthesis. Makes soda fizzy!

molecule_CH4.name: Methane
molecule_CH4.description: A potent greenhouse gas and the main component of natural gas.

molecule_NH3.name: Ammonia
molecule_NH3.description: A nitrogen-hydrogen compound crucial for fertilizer production via the Haber process.

goggles.name: Safety Goggles
goggles.description: Protect your eyes! Shows recipe hints in the lab.

speed_potion.name: Crafting Speed Potion
speed_potion.description: Speeds up crafting animations for 5 minutes.

mystery_molecule.name: Mystery Molecule
mystery_molecule.description: A strange, unidentified molecule. What could it be?

plastic_waste.name: Plastic Waste
plastic_waste.description: Discarded plastic items collected for recycling.

glass_waste.name: Glass Waste
glass_waste.description: Broken glass pieces collected for recycling.

paper_waste.name: Paper Waste
paper_waste.description: Used paper and cardboard for recycling.

organic_waste.name: Organic Waste
organic_waste.description: Food scraps and plant matter for composting.

recycled_plastic.name: Recycled Plastic Pellets
recycled_plastic.description: Processed plastic ready for reuse in manufacturing.

recycled_glass.name: Glass Cullet
recycled_glass.description: Crushed and cleaned glass ready for new products.

recycled_metal.name: Recycled Metal Ingot
recycled_metal.description: Melted and purified metal ready for reuse.

composite_wood.name: Composite Wood Board
composite_wood.description: Recycled wood fibers bonded together — stronger than regular wood!

compost.name: Compost
compost.description: Nutrient-rich organic compost — great for plants!

eco_brick.name: Eco Brick
eco_brick.description: A building brick made from recycled materials — the future of construction!

biofuel.name: Biofuel
biofuel.description: Renewable fuel derived from organic matter — a clean energy alternative!

carbon_credit.name: Carbon Credit
carbon_credit.description: Offset 1 ton of CO₂ emissions from the atmosphere.

solar_panel.name: Solar Panel
solar_panel.description: Harness the sun's energy to generate clean electricity.

clean_water.name: Clean Water
clean_water.description: Filtered, drinkable water — a precious resource.

co2_captured.name: Captured CO₂
co2_captured.description: CO₂ removed from the atmosphere through carbon capture technology.

pollution_sample.name: Pollution Sample
pollution_sample.description: A sample of contaminated air or water from an industrial area.

green_certificate.name: Green Certificate
green_certificate.description: Proof of sustainable practices — EcoVille is now carbon neutral!

prism.name: Prism
prism.description: Splits white light into the full spectrum of colors.

red_filter.name: Red Filter
red_filter.description: Only passes red wavelengths of light.

blue_filter.name: Blue Filter
blue_filter.description: Only passes blue wavelengths of light.

green_filter.name: Green Filter
green_filter.description: Only passes green wavelengths of light.

white_light.name: White Light
white_light.description: Full-spectrum light containing all visible wavelengths.

convex_lens.name: Convex Lens
convex_lens.description: Focuses light to a point — used to unlock advanced light puzzles.

rainbow_gem.name: Rainbow Gem
rainbow_gem.description: A gem that shines with all the colors of the visible spectrum.

magnet_n.name: North Magnet
magnet_n.description: Magnetic north pole — attracts south poles, repels north poles.

magnet_s.name: South Magnet
magnet_s.description: Magnetic south pole — attracts north poles, repels south poles.

iron_filings.name: Iron Filings
iron_filings.description: Fine iron particles that align with magnetic field lines.

copper_wire.name: Copper Wire
copper_wire.description: Conductive wire used to build electromagnets.

compass.name: Compass
compass.description: Points to magnetic north and reveals magnetic field lines in navigator puzzles.

electromagnet.name: Electromagnet
electromagnet.description: A magnet controlled by electricity — its strength can be varied.

steel_alloy.name: Steel Alloy
steel_alloy.description: A strong iron-carbon alloy — the foundation of industrial machinery.

propulsion_device.name: Propulsion Device
propulsion_device.description: Generates thrust via magnetic fields — key to solving Magnet Core's ultimate challenge.

magnetic_shield.name: Magnetic Shield
magnetic_shield.description: Deflects magnetic interference — essential to stabilize the Core.

core_crystal.name: Core Crystal
core_crystal.description: The heart of Magnet Core — a perfectly balanced magnetic crystal.
